body.purpose: Tables, forms, cards — the workhorse at text-sm.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: True overlays only (popover, command palette). Never on resting cards.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Route/section entrances via the motion seam (ADR-0027).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The screen's one green action — Figure Green Deep fill, off-white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.5 0.16 138); color: oklch(0.99 0.003 95); font: 500 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0 16px; height: 40px; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; transition: background 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.42 0.14 138); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.57 0.17 138); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary and toggle-style actions — 1px Ink border, Frost hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.26 0 0); font: 500 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0 12px; height: 36px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.26 0 0); border-radius: 0.75rem; transition: background 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0 0); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.57 0.17 138); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Paper surface, hairline border, flat at rest — the ledger page.
components.html:
Identity

Sede: Linda Vista · Level: Secundaria
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font: 600 1.125rem/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: oklch(0.26 0 0); margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font: 400 0.875rem/1.5 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.52 0 0); margin: 0; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Paper fill, hairline border, green focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #ffffff; color: oklch(0.26 0 0); font: 400 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 0.75rem; width: 240px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.52 0 0); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.57 0.17 138); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link (active)
components.description: The active route — the shell's strongest green moment; inactive rows are muted with Frost hover.
components.html: DashboardCalendarCourses
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; width: 220px; } .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; font: 500 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.52 0 0); padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s ease-out, color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0 0); color: oklch(0.26 0 0); } .ds-nav-link--active { background: oklch(0.5 0.16 138); color: oklch(0.99 0.003 95); font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-link--active:hover { background: oklch(0.5 0.16 138); color: oklch(0.99 0.003 95); }

components.name: Status Chip (success)
components.description: Green tint for success (issued, passing, approved); all other statuses stay mono per the Mono Verdict Rule.
components.css: .ds-chip-success { display: inline-block; background: oklch(0.93 0.05 138); color: oklch(0.34 0.11 138); font: 500 0.75rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 6px; margin-right: 8px; } .ds-chip-mono { display: inline-block; background: oklch(0.96 0 0); color: oklch(0.45 0 0); font: 500 0.75rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 6px; }

narrative.overview: FundaVida is a well-kept record book for three community centers: every entry legible, every column ruled, nothing decorative between the reader and the record. Near-monochrome engineering restraint — Frost canvas, Paper surfaces, Ink text, hairline borders — with Figure Green (the logo green, hue 138) as the single chromatic voice. The green is scarce so it is semantically loud: the primary action, the active nav entry, and moments of achievement. Hope is carried by the green and the copy, never by ornament.
keyCharacteristics: Flat, bordered, quietly confident — structure from hairlines, not shadows
One accent (Figure Green) on ≤10% of any screen
Light and dark themes from the same OKLCH triplet tokens
Dense where the work is dense; generous where it breathes
Every string EN + ES; loading / empty / no-results states are part of every surface

rules.name: The Scarce Green Rule
rules.body: Figure Green appears on at most 10% of any screen — the primary action, the active state, the achievement. If a screen reads green, it is shouting.

rules.name: The Mono Verdict Rule
rules.body: warning and info are deliberately neutralized to the mono ramp. Only success (green) and error (red) get hue. Do not colorize them.

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: The brand green is Figure Green, hue 138. #7CFC00 is prohibited — formally reverted.

rules.name: The Tabular Numbers Rule
rules.body: Any number a user might compare down a column renders in Geist Mono with tabular-nums, right-aligned.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: If a surface needs separation, it gets a 1px Hairline border, not a shadow. Cards are flat at rest.

dos: Do define every color as an OKLCH triplet custom property consumed via oklch(var(--token)).
Do keep Figure Green scarce: primary action, active nav, achievement — and stop there.
Do separate surfaces with 1px Hairline borders and tonal layering; the single elevated shadow is for true overlays only.
Do render comparable numbers in Geist Mono tabular-nums.
Do route every string through i18next (EN + ES) and ship loading / empty / no-results states with every list.
Do give every interactive component its full state set: hover, focus-visible, active, disabled.
donts: Don't use #7CFC00 — the electric lime is formally reverted; the brand green is Figure Green #32982D (hue 138).
Don't build SaaS dashboard clichés — hero-metric cards with gradient accents, identical icon-card grids, decorative glassmorphism.
Don't drift into NGO-pastel softness; warmth comes from copy and the green.
Don't render the same concept twice on one screen with different chrome — one surface per concept.
Don't colorize warning or info — they are mono by decision.
Don't add shadows to resting cards or side-stripe borders to list items; the ledger is flat and ruled.
